name: Fried Sliced Shrimp Peking Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the egg and cornstarch to form a batter. Dip the shrimp into the batter.
Heat the oil in a pan, then add the shrimp one at a time. Cook until they are golden brown.
Drain excess oil on a paper towel.
2. In a separate sauté pan, combine the remaining ingredients (scallion, garlic,
sherry, sugar, salt, and hot pepper). Heat the mixture over medium heat.
Add the cooked shrimp to the pan and stir until well coated in the sauce.
Serve immediately.
